*** 1 INJ *** NWS STORM SURVEY TEAM CONFIRMS A MICROBURST AFFECTED PORTIONS OF WARSAW KY. THE WINDS SNAPPED OR UPROOTED SEVERAL TREES WITH TRUNK DIAMETERS OF 8-15 INCHES. DAMAGE ALSO OCCURRED TO ROOFING...FENCING...AND BLEACHERS AT GALLATIN HIGH SCHOOL. A RESIDENT OF A MOBILE HOME SUSTAINED A MINOR HEAD LACERATION WHEN THE MOBILE HOME WAS PUNCTURED BY A FALLING TREE.
FIVE BOATS DAMAGED AND THREE SET ADRIFT AT SMUGGLERS COVE MARINA.
4 VEHICLES REPORTED WASHED AWAY AT A RESIDENCE. ALSO...12 ROADS CLOSED ACROSS THE COUNTY...INCLUDING VEVAY.
SEVERAL TREE LIMBS DOWNED NEAR OHIO ROUTE 362.
ONE LARGE TREE DOWNED ON CAREYS RUN POND CREEK ROAD.
TWO TREES WERE DOWNED DUE TO THUNDERSTORM WINDS IN THE VICINITY OF PROSPECT ROAD AND HIGHWAY 62.
SEVERAL TREES AND POWER LINES DOWN. SOME CAMPERS AND TRAILERS ALSO BLOWN OVER NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF ROUTE 41 AND INTERSTATE 71. TIME ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.

SEVERAL TREES AND POWER LINES DOWNED DUE TO STRAIGHT LINE THUNDERSTORM WINDS. A TRACTOR TRAILER WAS BLOWN OVER NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF ROUTE 41 AND INTERSTATE 71. INTERSTATE 71 WAS CLOSED FOR SEVERAL HOURS DUE TO THE DOWNED POWER LINES. ADJUSTED TIME ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.

*** 1 INJ *** A CAMPER WAS ROLLED OVER AND HEAVILY DAMAGED DUE TO STRAIGHT LINE THUNDERSTORM WINDS. A MAN WAS REPORTEDLY TRAPPED INSIDE THE CAMPER WHEN THIS OCCURRED...RESULTING IN INJURY. BASED ON THE DAMAGE OBSERVED IN PHOTOGRAPHS AT THIS LOCATION AND OTHER DAMAGE NEARBY IN THE AREA...THE WIND GUST WAS ESTIMATED TO BE 75 MILES PER HOUR.
